chunks.title: Praise for God's Deliverance
chunks.reason: A prayer of thanksgiving describing God as a refuge and defender against the ruthless.

chunks.title: The Future Banquet and Victory
chunks.reason: A prophetic vision of a feast for all peoples and the final defeat of death.

chunks.title: Judgment on Moab
chunks.reason: A specific oracle detailing the destruction of Moab and its fortifications.
